## Environment
- synapsis-core version: [e.g. 0.5.1]
- Rust version: `rustc --version`
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 14]

## Description
Clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Run `...`
2. Call function `...` with arguments `...`
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What should happen instead.

## Actual behavior
Full error output.

## Additional context
- Does it happen every time?
- Does it happen with specific features enabled (pqc, postgres)?
